log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 20] FAIL! 48 necrotic damage. HP: 19/67
--- Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 3 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician healed for 6 HP. HP: 25/67
